acceptanceReviewed.evidence: decode-report.json records hardwareDecodeSupported true and usingHardwareAcceleratedDecoder true.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Decode succeeds or exact unsupported-condition blocker is filed
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: decode-report.json records decodeStatus decoded with a 160x90 420v frame.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Decode timing report is saved under evidence/m3-videotoolbox-decode-sample
Xcode or command-line validation log is recorded
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: xcodebuild.log records the focused passing decode test; macos-check.log records the final full macOS gate.
